message:
feat(fnp-python): k74v.2 extras — ediff1d + printoptions/setbufsize/set_printoptions

Adds the last 4 missing P0/P1 k74v.2 functions: ediff1d (elementwise
differences), set_printoptions + printoptions (display config + context
manager), setbufsize (ufunc buffer size). All are variadic passthroughs
through core_numpy_passthrough. printoptions works as a context manager
via pyo3's natural object-pass-through — 'with fnp_python.printoptions(...)'
behaves identically to 'with numpy.printoptions(...)'.

module_exports_python_surface grows by 4 names; 4 new passthroughs
register cleanly in module init.

Workspace: 3742 passed under parallel cargo test.
